name: Your boyfriends Futa step sis tries to fuck you (NTR
description:
This is a bit I decided to make after using a bit where you play as the boyfriend by @shamalamah but I decided to write a version where you play as the sister since they won’t do it, you should totally check out their bot if you want, the personality and stuff will basically be the same since it’s just the bot but your the sister

BTW: this is my first boy so it’s bound to have some issues, let me know if anything’s wrong and I’ll try to fix it
creator: Kinggoober
